hero.badge: Institutional security solutions with a trusted identity
hero.title: We protect critical sites with confidence.
hero.subtitle: From command rooms to field teams, we combine real capabilities and real technology to deliver practical protection.
hero.description: Practical security solutions for sensitive facilities and operations.

about.title: Why Trusted Guards Leads the Industry
about.description: For over 15 years, we've been the trusted security choice of major enterprises, financial institutions, and critical infrastructure providers. Our integrated approach combines advanced technology with real field expertise and 24/7 operations to create comprehensive security solutions.
about.mission: Our Mission: Deliver integrated security solutions that protect your most valuable assets and enable your team to focus on business growth and development.
about.vision: Our Vision: To be the leading and most trusted security partner in the region, setting standards for protection, innovation, and customer success.

services.title: Comprehensive Security Solutions Built for Every Threat

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.address: Address: 21-27 Third Avenue, Kensington, Cape Town, South Africa
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you soon.

footer.description: Global leader in intelligent security solutions. Protecting critical infrastructure and enterprises worldwide with next-generation technology and uncompromising service.

technology.title: Technology & Smart Systems
technology.description: Advanced technological solutions and smart AI-powered systems
technology.longDescription: We provide cutting-edge technological solutions combining the latest intelligent surveillance systems and advanced software to ensure comprehensive 24/7 protection.
features: Face Recognition and Instant Threat Detection
Instant Alert System with Real-Time Notifications
benefits: Easy management from a single dashboard

fire-rescue.title: Fire Fighting & Rescue Services
fire-rescue.description: Professional rescue teams equipped with cutting-edge equipment
fire-rescue.longDescription: A specialized team of rescue professionals trained to the highest international standards, equipped with the latest firefighting and rescue equipment.

facilities.title: Facilities Management & Maintenance
facilities.longDescription: Comprehensive facility management services including regular maintenance, emergency response, and cleaning with continuous monitoring.

marine.title: Marine & Coastal Protection
marine.description: Advanced maritime and coastal security services
marine.longDescription: Comprehensive coastal and territorial water protection with specialized trained teams for maritime operations.

vip-protection.title: VIP & Family Protection
vip-protection.description: Luxury and discreet personal protection services
vip-protection.longDescription: Premium protection services for prominent individuals and families with complete confidentiality and discretion.
benefits: Peace of mind and personal security

events.title: Event & Conference Security
events.description: Comprehensive security for events and conferences
events.longDescription: Complete security services for large events, parties, and conferences with crowd management and area protection.

command-center.title: Command & Control Center
command-center.description: Modern control room with smart surveillance systems
command-center.longDescription: An advanced command center equipped with the latest technologies for managing and monitoring all security operations with high efficiency.

recruitment.title: Careers at Trusted Guards
recruitment.subtitle: Join a Team That Makes a Difference
recruitment.description: We are always looking for talented and ambitious individuals to join our growing team. If you are passionate about security and want to be part of a leading organization, explore our current opportunities.

growth.title: Career Growth
growth.description: We offer clear career advancement paths and continuous professional development programs.

training.title: World-Class Training
training.description: Access to internationally certified training programs and the latest security methodologies.

compensation.title: Competitive Compensation
compensation.description: Attractive salary packages with comprehensive benefits including health insurance and bonuses.

environment.title: Professional Environment
environment.description: Work in a supportive, team-oriented environment with state-of-the-art facilities.

security_officer.title: Security Officer
security_officer.description: We are seeking experienced security officers to join our team and ensure the safety of our clients' facilities.

control_room_operator.title: Control Room Operator
control_room_operator.description: Monitor and manage security operations from our state-of-the-art command center.
requirements: Experience with CCTV and surveillance systems

security_consultant.title: Security Consultant
security_consultant.description: Provide expert security assessments and recommendations to enterprise clients.

fire_safety_specialist.title: Fire Safety Specialist
fire_safety_specialist.description: Lead fire safety operations and ensure compliance with national and international standards.
